name: Blooms
author: Nick Bentley (2018) / AGP port
description: Nick Bentley's Go-like capture game on a hexhex board where each player owns TWO colours of stones. Place 1 or 2 stones per turn (2 must be different colours), then capture every enemy bloom (same-colour group) left with no empty neighbour. Suicide is legal, there is no passing, and the first player to capture X stones wins. Winner of the 2018 Best Combinatorial Game award.
